title: vaccinium bocatorense
intro: Vaccinium bocatorense, also known as the Bocatorense blueberry or Vaccinium bocatorense, is a species of shrub native to the Philippines and is a member of the heath family (Ericaceae). The medicinal properties of Vaccinium bocatorense include its high antioxidant content and potential anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Vaccinium bocatorense include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support cognitive function. Vaccinium bocatorense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
